channel.title: Chroniq Now: Breaking Global News and Headlines Daily
channel.description: Chroniq Now - your trusted source for breaking global news, in-depth analysis and up-to-the-minute coverage of politics, business, culture and more.

item.title: US Insurers Pledge Continued Coverage for Childhood Vaccines Through 2027
item.description:
Major U.S. health insurers will continue covering routine childhood vaccines through 2027, reinforcing confidence in vaccine safety amid ongoing policy debates and rising concerns over preventable disease outbreaks.

Key points:
• Major health insurers, represented by AHIP, pledged to continue covering routine childhood vaccines through 2027.
• The commitment extends support for vaccines recommended under existing immunization schedules despite ongoing policy debates.
• Health insurers said vaccine coverage decisions are based on scientific evidence, clinical data, and public health outcomes.
• The move comes amid concerns over declining vaccination rates and outbreaks of preventable diseases such as measles and whooping cough.

Read the full article: US Insurers Pledge Continued Coverage for Childhood Vaccines Through 2027

item.title: The "Croqueta Fee" Allegations: Did Personal Retaliation Taint an OCIF Enforcement Case?
item.description:
Inside the OCIF "Croqueta Fee" allegations involving Natalia Zequeira, Allied Fleet Services, AAA Car Rental, and Puerto Rico's financial regulator.

Read the full article: The "Croqueta Fee" Allegations: Did Personal Retaliation Taint an OCIF Enforcement Case?

item.title: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
item.description:
Driven Advisors and Administrative Services face scrutiny in a legal dispute with Bancrédito Holding Corp, owner of Bancrédito International Bank and Trust.

Read the full article: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
